titleStmt.title: SII 16.267: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 267. (A.R. No. 636 of 1920.) CHĀVALI, TENALI TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the southern gate of the Vālēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1489, also expressed by the chronogram nava-ashṭa-vārddhiśaśabhṛit, Prabhava, Māgha śu. 11 corresponding to 1568 January 10.

This record commences with a Sanskrit verse describing god Vālēśvara of Chāvali consecrated by Rāmabhadra and registers a gift of the village Tōṁṭapalli in Koṇḍavīḍusīma by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Komāra Veṅkaṭayyadēva Mahārāju on the orders of Yaram Timmarājaya for worship and offerings to the god. Koṇḍavīḍu-sīma is said to have been given a nāyaṅkara to the donor by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju Tirumalarājayyadēva Mahārāju. Also states that this was a renewal of an original grant of this village by Purushōttama Gajapati and mentions in addition, the gift of Boddalūru by Bhujabalarāya and some land by Siddhirāju Timmarājayya to the same temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīcevali purādhya
kṣō . gaṁgavāritaṭasthitaḥ . vālēśvarō
vijayatē . rāmabhadrapratiṣṭhataḥ . śrī
mānatrikulōdbhavō nṛpavaraḥ śrīveṁka
ṭēśānvayaḥ . putrastimma mahīpa
tēḥ puravarāṁ śrītōṁṭapallīṁ dadau
tad vālēśāya kōmāra veṁkkaṭamahī
pālōttamaḥ kī¨rttimān® dhanyaḥ śrīyaraṁ
dimma bhūvaravarānujō viśēṣādaraḥ . 2 .
śākābdhēṣu navāṣṭavā¨rdhiśaśabhṛtsaṁkhyā
gatēṣu spuraṁ . māghē śrīprabhavākhya va
tsarayutē caikādaśī vāsarē . vālēśāya
sama¨rpitā saphalitā śrītōṁṭapallī purī .
sarvajñēna komāra veṁkaṭadharādhīśēna nityaṁ
mudā . 3 . śrīśrīṁjēyun . śubhamastu . svastiśrī
jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbu
lu 1489 Agunēṭi prabhava saṁvvatsara māgha śu
11 lu śrīsakala jagadīśvarulaina cāvali vālēśvara
śrīmahāliṁggānaku śrīmanmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara
veṁkkaṭēśuni komāra veṁkkaṭayya dēvamahārā
juluṁgāru Anaṁttamulaina sāṣṭāṁgādaṁḍḍanama
skāramulu sama¨rppiṁcci yiccina bhūdānadha
rmaśāsanapatrakrama meṭlannanu . śrīmadrājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī
sadāsivadēvamahārāyaluṁgāru pruthvi
sāmrājyamu sēyucuṁḍḍaṁgānu śrīma
nmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara rāmarāju tirumala
rājayyadēva mahārājuluṁgāru mā
nāyaṁkkarānaku pāliṁcca navadhariṁccina
koṁḍḍavīṭi śīmalōnu koṁḍatū¨rppu tō
ṁṭapalli grāmamu svāmiyokka nityanayi
vēdya dīpārādhana kalyāṇamahōtsavamu
lu mōdalaina sakalōpacārālakunnu sahi
raṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvakamugānu Ā
caṁdrā¨rkasthāyigānu sama¨rppiṁstimi gana
ka svāmi sakala bhōgālunnu Anubhaviṁ
ccunadi . śrīśrīśrī yēkaiva bhaginīlōkē sarvē
ṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ . nabhōjyā na karagrāhyā
śaṁbhudattā vasuṁdharā . śrīśrīśrī jēyu .
puruṣōttamagajapati datti tōṁ
ṭṭapalligrāmaṁ punaruddharaṇaṁ komā
raveṁkkaṭarāju sama¨rpaṇa . śrīca
vali vālēśvaruniki bhujabalarāya
datti boddalūri grāmamu . śrī
vvālēśvaruniki siddhirāju timmarājayya
vāru sama¨rpiṁcci yippiṁccina khaṁ
ḍḍikalu śrīnātharājuvāri cēta yippiṁ
ccina yiṁṭūri khaṁḍḍika 1 nni Anaṁtarā
ju cētayippiṁccina Amṛtalūri khaṁḍḍi
ka 1 nni sarepallivāricēta yippiṁccina kaṇaṁgā
la khaṁḍḍika 1 nni cevali Aḍḍagaḍa suṁkhaṁmu
nnu yivi siddhirāju timmarājayyavāru svā
mi kalyāṇa mahōtsavānaku sama
¨rppiṁccinavi .
Digital edition of SII 16.267 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
